infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Synapse sends you daily planning reminders and check-ins to help you stay on track.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Synapse adds your project deadlines to your calendar so you never miss them.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Synapse adds your project deadlines to your calendar so you never miss them.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Synapse uses your microphone so you can voice-record your brain dumps and planning sessions.
infoPlist.UISpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Synapse transcribes your voice notes to help you capture ideas hands-free.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Synapse reads your due-today reminders to include them in your morning planning context.
